title: zapoteca formosa subsp. rosei
intro: Zapoteca formosa subsp. rosei, also known as the Rose Zapoteca, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The Rose Zapoteca is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
